name: QRadar Audit: High Parsing Utilization
notes: This rule triggers when high parsing utilization is reached. If Parsing load continues growing then a saturation point will be reached and some events will not be parsed and normalized.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Health Metrics
when the event matches Metric ID (custom) is any of EventParserThreadInfo
when the event matches Element (custom) is any of CpuUtil
when the event matches Value (custom) is greater than 75
TD_list: APPLY QRadar Audit: High Parsing Utilization on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Health Metrics
AND when the event matches Metric ID (custom) is any of EventParserThreadInfo
AND when the event matches Element (custom) is any of CpuUtil
AND when the event matches Value (custom) is greater than 75
RED_list: Event description: Detects when high parsing utilization is reached. If Parsing load continues growing then a saturation point will be reached and some events will not be parsed and normalized.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Hostname (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
